case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY VS. JOANNA M MCNANEY

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MCNANEY, JOANNA M JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
